name: evolver-tools
description: 201 CLI tools + 9 flagship projects — one pip install

pricing_model.free: All 201 tools + 9 flagship — fully open source (MIT)

new_in_v17: license — built-in open-source license display (MIT, Apache, GPL, BSD, MPL)
random — cryptographically secure random password/uuid/hex/int generator
tree — directory tree viewer with depth control and dirs-only mode
csv-view — formatted CSV/TSV viewer with auto-delimiter detection
new_in_v18: rot13 — ROT13/ROT47 text cipher (stdin or arg)
hexdump — Hex dump with ASCII view (file or stdin)
epoch — Unix timestamp / human date converter
new_in_v19: timeout — Run command with timeout limit
yes — Output a string repeatedly until killed
nl — Number lines of files or stdin
new_in_v20: fold — Wrap input lines to specified width
watch — Run command periodically, showing output
new_in_v21: pdf_info — Extract PDF metadata — pages, title, author, size
csv_merge — Merge CSV files by common column (inner/left/outer join)
json_flatten — Flatten nested JSON to dot-notation key=value pairs
http_server — Simple static file HTTP server
new_in_v22: crc_check — CRC32/CRC64 checksum calculator for files
new_in_v23: ip_info — Show public IP address and geolocation info
tsv2csv — Convert TSV (tab-separated) to CSV format
json_merge — Merge multiple JSON files into one
file_find — Find files by name pattern with recursive search
features: 9 flagship projects (500-1700 lines each, CLI+TUI dual mode)
Zero external dependencies across all tools
Single pip install — no version conflicts
